name: PENILE FIBROMATOSIS
definition: PEYRONIE DISEASE = INDURATIO PENIS PLASTICA benign acquired condition characterized by chronic inflammation → fibrosis + focal
dominant_finding: focal hyperechoic thickening of tunica albuginea with shadowing ← calcification
distribution: focal hyperechoic thickening of tunica albuginea with shadowing ← calcification
discriminating_features: focal hyperechoic thickening of tunica albuginea with shadowing ← calcification
focal nonshadowing echogenic thickening of tunica
nodular echogenic thickening of intercorporeal septum
hypointense focal thickening of tunica on T1WI + T2WI

general: focal hyperechoic thickening of tunica albuginea with shadowing ← calcification
focal nonshadowing echogenic thickening of tunica
nodular echogenic thickening of intercorporeal septum
hypointense focal thickening of tunica on T1WI + T2WI
